name: Salsa
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 lb Tomatoes, peeled, seeded and coarsely chopped (10 medium)
1 small White onion, peeled and diced
1 Fresh green chili pepper, seeded and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a slow cooker.
2. Set on low and cook, covered, for approximately 45 minutes, or just until ingredients are thoroughly heated and sauce is hot.
3. Makes 2 cups.
